name: Brewster Kahle
notes: Born 1960 NYC; MIT 1982; co-founder Thinking Machines / WAIS Inc / Alexa Internet (sold to Amazon 1999 for $250M stock); Internet Hall of Fame 2012; National Academy of Engineering 2010; founder Kahle/Austin Foundation

name: Mary Austin
notes: Wife of Brewster Kahle; co-funds Internet Archive via family foundation

name: Rick Prelinger
notes: Pro bono; founder of the Prelinger Archives (acquired by Library of Congress 2002)

notes: Founder David Rumsey Map Collection; longtime IA board
